title: 2 Thessalonians (Codex Vaticanus)
source: Codex Vaticanus (4th c.) via Vatican Library IIIF + Tischendorf Greek + KJV
description: The book of 2 Thessalonians from Codex Vaticanus (Vat.gr.1209, 4th century AD), considered by many scholars the most important manuscript of the Greek Bible. Folio scans via Vatican Library IIIF (digi.vatlib.it). Greek from Tischendorf 8th edition. English from the King James Version (1611, public domain).
introduction: Codex Vaticanus (Vat.gr.1209, 4th century AD) is widely regarded as the single most important manuscript of the Greek Bible. It has been in the Vatican Library since at least 1475. Along with Codex Sinaiticus, it is one of the two oldest near-complete copies of the Bible in existence.

translation.text: <sup>1</sup>Paul, and Silvanus, and Timotheus, unto the church of the Thessalonians in God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ: <sup>2</sup>Grace unto you, and peace, from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ. <sup>3</sup>We are bound to thank God always for you, brethren, as it is meet, because that your faith groweth exceedingly, and the charity of every one of you all toward each other aboundeth; <sup>4</sup>So that we ourselves glory in you in the churches of God for your patience and faith in all your persecutions and tribulations that ye endure: <sup>5</sup>Which is a manifest token of the righteous judgment of God, that ye may be counted worthy of the kingdom of God, for which ye also suffer:

translation.original_text: <sup>6</sup>εἴπερ<S>1512</S> δίκαιον<S>1342</S> παρὰ<S>3844</S> θεῷ<S>2316</S> ἀνταποδοῦναι<S>467</S> τοῖς<S>3588</S> θλίβουσιν<S>2346</S> ὑμᾶς<S>5210</S> θλῖψιν<S>2347</S> <sup>7</sup>καὶ<S>2532</S> ὑμῖν<S>5210</S> τοῖς<S>3588</S> θλιβομένοις<S>2346</S> ἄνεσιν<S>425</S> μεθ’<S>3326</S> ἡμῶν<S>2249</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> τῇ<S>3588</S> ἀποκαλύψει<S>602</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> κυρίου<S>2962</S> Ἰησοῦ<S>2424</S> ἀπ’<S>575</S> οὐρανοῦ<S>3772</S> μετ’<S>3326</S> ἀγγέλων<S>32</S> δυνάμεως<S>1411</S> αὐτοῦ<S>846</S> <sup>8</sup>ἐν<S>1722</S> πυρὶ<S>4442</S> φλογός,<S>5395</S> διδόντος<S>1325</S> ἐκδίκησιν<S>1557</S> τοῖς<S>3588</S> μὴ<S>3361</S> εἰδόσιν<S>1492</S> θεὸν<S>2316</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> τοῖς<S>3588</S> μὴ<S>3361</S> ὑπακούουσιν<S>5219</S> τῷ<S>3588</S> εὐαγγελίῳ<S>2098</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> κυρίου<S>2962</S> ἡμῶν<S>2249</S> Ἰησοῦ,<S>2424</S> <sup>9</sup>οἵτινες<S>3748</S> δίκην<S>1349</S> τίσουσιν<S>5099</S> ὄλεθρον<S>3639</S> αἰώνιον<S>166</S> ἀπὸ<S>575</S> προσώπου<S>4383</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> κυρίου<S>2962</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> ἀπὸ<S>575</S> τῆς<S>3588</S> δόξης<S>1391</S> τῆς<S>3588</S> ἰσχύος<S>2479</S> αὐτοῦ,<S>846</S> <sup>10</sup>ὅταν<S>3752</S> ἔλθῃ<S>2064</S> ἐνδοξασθῆναι<S>1740</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> τοῖς<S>3588</S> ἁγίοις<S>40</S> αὐτοῦ<S>846</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> θαυμασθῆναι<S>2296</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> πᾶσιν<S>3956</S> τοῖς<S>3588</S> πιστεύσασιν,<S>4100</S> ὅτι<S>3754</S> ἐπιστεύθη<S>4100</S> τὸ<S>3588</S> μαρτύριον<S>3142</S> ἡμῶν<S>2249</S> ἐφ’<S>1909</S> ὑμᾶς,<S>5210</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> τῇ<S>3588</S> ἡμέρᾳ<S>2250</S> ἐκείνῃ.<S>1565</S>
translation.text:
<sup>6</sup>Seeing
it is a righteous thing with God to recompense tribulation to them that trouble you; <sup>7</sup>And to you who are troubled rest with us, when the Lord Jesus shall be revealed from heaven with his mighty angels, <sup>8</sup>In flaming fire taking vengeance on them that know not God, and that obey not the gospel of our Lord Jesus Christ: <sup>9</sup>Who shall be punished with everlasting destruction from the presence of the Lord, and from the glory of his power; <sup>10</sup>When he shall come to be glorified in his saints, and to be admired in all them that believe (because our testimony among you was believed) in that day.

translation.original_text: <sup>11</sup>Εἰς<S>1519</S> ὃ<S>3739</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> προσευχόμεθα<S>4336</S> πάντοτε<S>3842</S> περὶ<S>4012</S> ὑμῶν,<S>5210</S> ἵνα<S>2443</S> ὑμᾶς<S>5210</S> ἀξιώσῃ<S>515</S> τῆς<S>3588</S> κλήσεως<S>2821</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> θεὸς<S>2316</S> ἡμῶν<S>2249</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> πληρώσῃ<S>4137</S> πᾶσαν<S>3956</S> εὐδοκίαν<S>2107</S> ἀγαθωσύνης<S>19</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> ἔργον<S>2041</S> πίστεως<S>4102</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> δυνάμει,<S>1411</S> <sup>12</sup>ὅπως<S>3704</S> ἐνδοξασθῇ<S>1740</S> τὸ<S>3588</S> ὄνομα<S>3686</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> κυρίου<S>2962</S> ἡμῶν<S>2249</S> Ἰησοῦ<S>2424</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> ὑμῖν,<S>5210</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> ὑμεῖς<S>5210</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> αὐτῷ,<S>846</S> κατὰ<S>2596</S> τὴν<S>3588</S> χάριν<S>5485</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> θεοῦ<S>2316</S> ἡμῶν<S>2249</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> κυρίου<S>2962</S> Ἰησοῦ<S>2424</S> Χριστοῦ.<S>5547</S>
translation.text:
<sup>11</sup>Wherefore also we pray always for you, that our God would count you worthy of
this calling, and fulfil all the good pleasure of
his goodness, and the work of faith with power: <sup>12</sup>That the name of our Lord Jesus Christ may be glorified in you, and ye in him, according to the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.

translation.text:
<sup>1</sup>Now we beseech you, brethren, by the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, and
by our gathering together unto him, <sup>2</sup>That ye be not soon shaken in mind, or be troubled, neither by spirit, nor by word, nor by letter as from us, as that the day of Christ is at hand. <sup>3</sup>Let no man deceive you by any means: for
that day shall not come,
 except there come a falling away first, and that man of sin be revealed, the son of perdition; <sup>4</sup>Who opposeth and exalteth himself above all that is called God, or that is worshipped; so that he as God sitteth in the temple of God, shewing himself that he is God. <sup>5</sup>Remember ye not, that, when I was yet with you, I told you these things?

translation.original_text: <sup>6</sup>καὶ<S>2532</S> νῦν<S>3568</S> τὸ<S>3588</S> κατέχον<S>2722</S> οἴδατε,<S>1492</S> εἰς<S>1519</S> τὸ<S>3588</S> ἀποκαλυφθῆναι<S>601</S> αὐτὸν<S>846</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> τῷ<S>3588</S> αὐτοῦ<S>846</S> καιρῷ.<S>2540</S> <sup>7</sup>τὸ<S>3588</S> γὰρ<S>1063</S> μυστήριον<S>3466</S> ἤδη<S>2235</S> ἐνεργεῖται<S>1754</S> τῆς<S>3588</S> ἀνομίας·<S>458</S> μόνον<S>3440</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> κατέχων<S>2722</S> ἄρτι<S>737</S> ἕως<S>2193</S> ἐκ<S>1537</S> μέσου<S>3319</S> γένηται.<S>1096</S> <sup>8</sup>καὶ<S>2532</S> τότε<S>5119</S> ἀποκαλυφθήσεται<S>601</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> ἄνομος,<S>459</S> ὃν<S>3739</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> κύριος<S>2962</S> Ἰησοῦς<S>2424</S> ἀνελεῖ<S>337</S> τῷ<S>3588</S> πνεύματι<S>4151</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> στόματος<S>4750</S> αὐτοῦ<S>846</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> καταργήσει<S>2673</S> τῇ<S>3588</S> ἐπιφανείᾳ<S>2015</S> τῆς<S>3588</S> παρουσίας<S>3952</S> αὐτοῦ,<S>846</S> <sup>9</sup>οὗ<S>3739</S> ἐστιν<S>1510</S> ἡ<S>3588</S> παρουσία<S>3952</S> κατ’<S>2596</S> ἐνέργειαν<S>1753</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> σατανᾶ<S>4567</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> πάσῃ<S>3956</S> δυνάμει<S>1411</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> σημείοις<S>4592</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> τέρασιν<S>5059</S> ψεύδους<S>5579</S> <sup>10</sup>καὶ<S>2532</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> πάσῃ<S>3956</S> ἀπάτῃ<S>539</S> ἀδικίας<S>93</S> τοῖς<S>3588</S> ἀπολλυμένοις,<S>622</S> ἀνθ’<S>473</S> ὧν<S>3739</S> τὴν<S>3588</S> ἀγάπην<S>26</S> τῆς<S>3588</S> ἀληθείας<S>225</S> οὐκ<S>3756</S> ἐδέξαντο<S>1209</S> εἰς<S>1519</S> τὸ<S>3588</S> σωθῆναι<S>4982</S> αὐτούς.<S>846</S>
translation.text:
<sup>6</sup>And now ye know what withholdeth that he might be revealed in his time. <sup>7</sup>For the mystery of iniquity doth already work: only he who now letteth
will let, until he be taken out of the way. <sup>8</sup>And then shall that Wicked be revealed, whom the Lord shall consume with the spirit of his mouth, and shall destroy with the brightness of his coming: <sup>9</sup>Even him, whose coming is after the working of Satan with all power and signs and lying wonders, <sup>10</sup>And with all deceivableness of unrighteousness in them that perish; because they received not the love of the truth, that they might be saved.

translation.original_text: <sup>11</sup>καὶ<S>2532</S> διὰ<S>1223</S> τοῦτο<S>3778</S> πέμπει<S>3992</S> αὐτοῖς<S>846</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> θεὸς<S>2316</S> ἐνέργειαν<S>1753</S> πλάνης<S>4106</S> εἰς<S>1519</S> τὸ<S>3588</S> πιστεῦσαι<S>4100</S> αὐτοὺς<S>846</S> τῷ<S>3588</S> ψεύδει,<S>5579</S> <sup>12</sup>ἵνα<S>2443</S> κριθῶσιν<S>2919</S> ἅπαντες<S>537</S> οἱ<S>3588</S> μὴ<S>3361</S> πιστεύσαντες<S>4100</S> τῇ<S>3588</S> ἀληθείᾳ<S>225</S> ἀλλὰ<S>235</S> εὐδοκήσαντες<S>2106</S> τῇ<S>3588</S> ἀδικίᾳ.<S>93</S> <sup>13</sup>Ἡμεῖς<S>2249</S> δὲ<S>1161</S> ὀφείλομεν<S>3784</S> εὐχαριστεῖν<S>2168</S> τῷ<S>3588</S> θεῷ<S>2316</S> πάντοτε<S>3842</S> περὶ<S>4012</S> ὑμῶν,<S>5210</S> ἀδελφοὶ<S>80</S> ἠγαπημένοι<S>25</S> ὑπὸ<S>5259</S> κυρίου,<S>2962</S> ὅτι<S>3754</S> εἵλατο<S>138</S> ὑμᾶς<S>5210</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> θεὸς<S>2316</S> ἀπ’<S>575</S> ἀρχῆς<S>746</S> εἰς<S>1519</S> σωτηρίαν<S>4991</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> ἁγιασμῷ<S>38</S> πνεύματος<S>4151</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> πίστει<S>4102</S> ἀληθείας,<S>225</S> <sup>14</sup>εἰς<S>1519</S> ὃ<S>3739</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> ἐκάλεσεν<S>2564</S> ὑμᾶς<S>5210</S> διὰ<S>1223</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> εὐαγγελίου<S>2098</S> ἡμῶν,<S>2249</S> εἰς<S>1519</S> περιποίησιν<S>4047</S> δόξης<S>1391</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> κυρίου<S>2962</S> ἡμῶν<S>2249</S> Ἰησοῦ<S>2424</S> Χριστοῦ.<S>5547</S> <sup>15</sup>ἄρα<S>686</S> οὖν,<S>3767</S> ἀδελφοί,<S>80</S> στήκετε,<S>4739</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> κρατεῖτε<S>2902</S> τὰς<S>3588</S> παραδόσεις<S>3862</S> ἃς<S>3739</S> ἐδιδάχθητε<S>1321</S> εἴτε<S>1535</S> διὰ<S>1223</S> λόγου<S>3056</S> εἴτε<S>1535</S> δι’<S>1223</S> ἐπιστολῆς<S>1992</S> ἡμῶν.<S>2249</S>
translation.text: <sup>11</sup>And for this cause God shall send them strong delusion, that they should believe a lie: <sup>12</sup>That they all might be damned who believed not the truth, but had pleasure in unrighteousness. <sup>13</sup>But we are bound to give thanks alway to God for you, brethren beloved of the Lord, because God hath from the beginning chosen you to salvation through sanctification of the Spirit and belief of the truth: <sup>14</sup>Whereunto he called you by our gospel, to the obtaining of the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ. <sup>15</sup>Therefore, brethren, stand fast, and hold the traditions which ye have been taught, whether by word, or our epistle.

translation.original_text: <sup>16</sup>αὐτὸς<S>846</S> δὲ<S>1161</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> κύριος<S>2962</S> ἡμῶν<S>2249</S> Ἰησοῦς<S>2424</S> Χριστὸς<S>5547</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> θεὸς<S>2316</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> πατὴρ<S>3962</S> ἡμῶν,<S>2249</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> ἀγαπήσας<S>25</S> ἡμᾶς<S>2249</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> δοὺς<S>1325</S> παράκλησιν<S>3874</S> αἰωνίαν<S>166</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> ἐλπίδα<S>1680</S> ἀγαθὴν<S>18</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> χάριτι,<S>5485</S> <sup>17</sup>παρακαλέσαι<S>3870</S> ὑμῶν<S>5210</S> τὰς<S>3588</S> καρδίας<S>2588</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> στηρίξαι<S>4741</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> παντὶ<S>3956</S> ἔργῳ<S>2041</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> λόγῳ<S>3056</S> ἀγαθῷ.<S>18</S>
translation.text:
<sup>16</sup>Now our Lord Jesus Christ himself, and God, even our Father, which hath loved us, and hath given
us everlasting consolation and good hope through grace, <sup>17</sup>Comfort your hearts, and stablish you in every good word and work.

translation.original_text: <sup>1</sup>Τὸ<S>3588</S> λοιπὸν<S>3063</S> προσεύχεσθε,<S>4336</S> ἀδελφοί,<S>80</S> περὶ<S>4012</S> ἡμῶν,<S>2249</S> ἵνα<S>2443</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> λόγος<S>3056</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> κυρίου<S>2962</S> τρέχῃ<S>5143</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> δοξάζηται<S>1392</S> καθὼς<S>2531</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> πρὸς<S>4314</S> ὑμᾶς,<S>5210</S> <sup>2</sup>καὶ<S>2532</S> ἵνα<S>2443</S> ῥυσθῶμεν<S>4506</S> ἀπὸ<S>575</S> τῶν<S>3588</S> ἀτόπων<S>824</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> πονηρῶν<S>4190</S> ἀνθρώπων·<S>444</S> οὐ<S>3756</S> γὰρ<S>1063</S> πάντων<S>3956</S> ἡ<S>3588</S> πίστις.<S>4102</S> <sup>3</sup>πιστὸς<S>4103</S> δέ<S>1161</S> ἐστιν<S>1510</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> κύριος,<S>2962</S> ὃς<S>3739</S> στηρίξει<S>4741</S> ὑμᾶς<S>5210</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> φυλάξει<S>5442</S> ἀπὸ<S>575</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> πονηροῦ.<S>4190</S> <sup>4</sup>πεποίθαμεν<S>3982</S> δὲ<S>1161</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> κυρίῳ<S>2962</S> ἐφ’<S>1909</S> ὑμᾶς,<S>5210</S> ὅτι<S>3754</S> ἃ<S>3739</S> παραγγέλλομεν<S>3853</S> ποιεῖτε<S>4160</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> ποιήσετε.<S>4160</S> <sup>5</sup>ὁ<S>3588</S> δὲ<S>1161</S> κύριος<S>2962</S> κατευθύναι<S>2720</S> ὑμῶν<S>5210</S> τὰς<S>3588</S> καρδίας<S>2588</S> εἰς<S>1519</S> τὴν<S>3588</S> ἀγάπην<S>26</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> θεοῦ<S>2316</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> εἰς<S>1519</S> τὴν<S>3588</S> ὑπομονὴν<S>5281</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> Χριστοῦ.<S>5547</S>
translation.text:
<sup>1</sup>Finally, brethren, pray for us, that the word of the Lord may have
free course, and be glorified, even as
it is with you: <sup>2</sup>And that we may be delivered from unreasonable and wicked men: for all
men have not faith. <sup>3</sup>But the Lord is faithful, who shall stablish you, and keep
you
 from evil. <sup>4</sup>And we have confidence in the Lord touching you, that ye both do and will do the things which we command you. <sup>5</sup>And the Lord direct your hearts into the love of God, and into the patient waiting for Christ.

translation.original_text: <sup>6</sup>Παραγγέλλομεν<S>3853</S> δὲ<S>1161</S> ὑμῖν,<S>5210</S> ἀδελφοί,<S>80</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> ὀνόματι<S>3686</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> κυρίου<S>2962</S> ἡμῶν<S>2249</S> Ἰησοῦ<S>2424</S> Χριστοῦ,<S>5547</S> στέλλεσθαι<S>4724</S> ὑμᾶς<S>5210</S> ἀπὸ<S>575</S> παντὸς<S>3956</S> ἀδελφοῦ<S>80</S> ἀτάκτως<S>814</S> περιπατοῦντος<S>4043</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> μὴ<S>3361</S> κατὰ<S>2596</S> τὴν<S>3588</S> παράδοσιν<S>3862</S> ἣν<S>3739</S> παρελάβοσαν<S>3880</S> παρ’<S>3844</S> ἡμῶν.<S>2249</S> <sup>7</sup>αὐτοὶ<S>846</S> γὰρ<S>1063</S> οἴδατε<S>1492</S> πῶς<S>4459</S> δεῖ<S>1163</S> μιμεῖσθαι<S>3401</S> ἡμᾶς,<S>2249</S> ὅτι<S>3754</S> οὐκ<S>3756</S> ἠτακτήσαμεν<S>812</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> ὑμῖν<S>5210</S> <sup>8</sup>οὐδὲ<S>3761</S> δωρεὰν<S>1432</S> ἄρτον<S>740</S> ἐφάγομεν<S>5315</S> παρά<S>3844</S> τινος,<S>5100</S> ἀλλ’<S>235</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> κόπῳ<S>2873</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> μόχθῳ<S>3449</S> νυκτὸς<S>3571</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> ἡμέρας<S>2250</S> ἐργαζόμενοι<S>2038</S> πρὸς<S>4314</S> τὸ<S>3588</S> μὴ<S>3361</S> ἐπιβαρῆσαί<S>1912</S> τινα<S>5100</S> ὑμῶν·<S>5210</S> <sup>9</sup>οὐχ<S>3756</S> ὅτι<S>3754</S> οὐκ<S>3756</S> ἔχομεν<S>2192</S> ἐξουσίαν,<S>1849</S> ἀλλ’<S>235</S> ἵνα<S>2443</S> ἑαυτοὺς<S>1438</S> τύπον<S>5179</S> δῶμεν<S>1325</S> ὑμῖν<S>5210</S> εἰς<S>1519</S> τὸ<S>3588</S> μιμεῖσθαι<S>3401</S> ἡμᾶς.<S>2249</S> <sup>10</sup>καὶ<S>2532</S> γὰρ<S>1063</S> ὅτε<S>3753</S> ἦμεν<S>1510</S> πρὸς<S>4314</S> ὑμᾶς,<S>5210</S> τοῦτο<S>3778</S> παρηγγέλλομεν<S>3853</S> ὑμῖν,<S>5210</S> ὅτι<S>3754</S> εἴ<S>1487</S> τις<S>5100</S> οὐ<S>3756</S> θέλει<S>2309</S> ἐργάζεσθαι<S>2038</S> μηδὲ<S>3366</S> ἐσθιέτω.<S>2068</S>
translation.text: <sup>6</sup>Now we command you, brethren, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, that ye withdraw yourselves from every brother that walketh disorderly, and not after the tradition which he received of us. <sup>7</sup>For yourselves know how ye ought to follow us: for we behaved not ourselves disorderly among you; <sup>8</sup>Neither did we eat any man’s bread for nought; but wrought with labour and travail night and day, that we might not be chargeable to any of you: <sup>9</sup>Not because we have not power, but to make ourselves an ensample unto you to follow us. <sup>10</sup>For even when we were with you, this we commanded you, that if any would not work, neither should he eat.

translation.original_text: <sup>11</sup>ἀκούομεν<S>191</S> γάρ<S>1063</S> τινας<S>5100</S> περιπατοῦντας<S>4043</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> ὑμῖν<S>5210</S> ἀτάκτως,<S>814</S> μηδὲν<S>3367</S> ἐργαζομένους<S>2038</S> ἀλλὰ<S>235</S> περιεργαζομένους·<S>4020</S> <sup>12</sup>τοῖς<S>3588</S> δὲ<S>1161</S> τοιούτοις<S>5108</S> παραγγέλλομεν<S>3853</S> καὶ<S>2532</S> παρακαλοῦμεν<S>3870</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> κυρίῳ<S>2962</S> Ἰησοῦ<S>2424</S> Χριστῷ<S>5547</S> ἵνα<S>2443</S> μετὰ<S>3326</S> ἡσυχίας<S>2271</S> ἐργαζόμενοι<S>2038</S> τὸν<S>3588</S> ἑαυτῶν<S>1438</S> ἄρτον<S>740</S> ἐσθίωσιν.<S>2068</S> <sup>13</sup>ὑμεῖς<S>5210</S> δέ,<S>1161</S> ἀδελφοί,<S>80</S> μὴ<S>3361</S> ἐγκακήσητε<S>1573</S> καλοποιοῦντες.<S>2569</S> <sup>14</sup>εἰ<S>1487</S> δέ<S>1161</S> τις<S>5100</S> οὐχ<S>3756</S> ὑπακούει<S>5219</S> τῷ<S>3588</S> λόγῳ<S>3056</S> ἡμῶν<S>2249</S> διὰ<S>1223</S> τῆς<S>3588</S> ἐπιστολῆς,<S>1992</S> τοῦτον<S>3778</S> σημειοῦσθε,<S>4593</S> μὴ<S>3361</S> συναναμίγνυσθε<S>4874</S> αὐτῷ,<S>846</S> ἵνα<S>2443</S> ἐντραπῇ·<S>1788</S> <sup>15</sup>καὶ<S>2532</S> μὴ<S>3361</S> ὡς<S>5613</S> ἐχθρὸν<S>2190</S> ἡγεῖσθε,<S>2233</S> ἀλλὰ<S>235</S> νουθετεῖτε<S>3560</S> ὡς<S>5613</S> ἀδελφόν.<S>80</S>
translation.text:
<sup>11</sup>For we hear that there are some which walk among you disorderly, working not at all, but are busybodies. <sup>12</sup>Now them that are such we command and exhort by our Lord Jesus Christ, that with quietness they work, and eat their own bread. <sup>13</sup>But ye, brethren, be not weary in well doing. <sup>14</sup>And if any man obey not our word by this epistle, note that man, and have no company with him, that he may be ashamed. <sup>15</sup>Yet count
him not as an enemy, but admonish
him
 as a brother.

translation.original_text: <sup>16</sup>αὐτὸς<S>846</S> δὲ<S>1161</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> κύριος<S>2962</S> τῆς<S>3588</S> εἰρήνης<S>1515</S> δῴη<S>1325</S> ὑμῖν<S>5210</S> τὴν<S>3588</S> εἰρήνην<S>1515</S> διαπαντὸς<S>1275</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> παντὶ<S>3956</S> τρόπῳ.<S>5158</S> ὁ<S>3588</S> κύριος<S>2962</S> μετὰ<S>3326</S> πάντων<S>3956</S> ὑμῶν.<S>5210</S> <sup>17</sup>Ὁ<S>3588</S> ἀσπασμὸς<S>783</S> τῇ<S>3588</S> ἐμῇ<S>1699</S> χειρὶ<S>5495</S> Παύλου,<S>3972</S> ὅ<S>3739</S> ἐστιν<S>1510</S> σημεῖον<S>4592</S> ἐν<S>1722</S> πάσῃ<S>3956</S> ἐπιστολῇ·<S>1992</S> οὕτως<S>3779</S> γράφω.<S>1125</S> <sup>18</sup>ἡ<S>3588</S> χάρις<S>5485</S> τοῦ<S>3588</S> κυρίου<S>2962</S> ἡμῶν<S>2249</S> Ἰησοῦ<S>2424</S> Χριστοῦ<S>5547</S> μετὰ<S>3326</S> πάντων<S>3956</S> ὑμῶν.<S>5210</S>
translation.text:
<sup>16</sup>Now the Lord of peace himself give you peace always by all means. The Lord
be with you all. <sup>17</sup>The salutation of Paul with mine own hand, which is the token in every epistle: so I write. <sup>18</sup>The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ
be with you all. Amen.
